core_mechanism: a structure-preserving encoding that maps each equational constraint to a permutation/wreath-product group, reducing a classification problem about one algebraic structure into questions about a group so that the target domain's tools can solve the source problem
brief_reason: The abstract states that a wreath product is associated with any linear identity so that 'questions about linear groupoids can therefore be transferred to groups and attacked by group-theoretical computational tools,' which is exactly a problem-preserving reduction into a group representation.
